title: Pinned notes do not float to top
body: NoteList renders notes in insertion order; pinned notes should be sorted above the rest.

title: Editor saves notes with empty title
body: NoteEditor.save() does not validate the title, allowing blank notes. Require a non-empty title.

title: Deleting a note does not ask for confirmation
body: Delete is immediate and irreversible. Add a confirmation step before removeNote.

title: Notes lost on page refresh
body: State lives only in memory. Persist notes to localStorage and rehydrate on load.

title: No search/filter for notes
body: As notes grow, users need a search box filtering by title/body.

title: togglePin mutates during iteration edge case
body: Rapid pin toggles can desync the computed list; verify reactivity for togglePin.

title: Editor textarea does not grow
body: The body textarea is fixed height. Make it auto-resize for long notes.
